title: Axis Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Axis Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
